marked_piece_destination_count: {movement_rule_text} How many empty points can the X-marked piece move to now?
{movement_rule_text} Count the empty points that are directly linked to the X-marked piece.
{movement_rule_text} What is the number of one-step legal moves for the X-marked piece?
{movement_rule_text} Count only empty points joined to the X-marked piece by one drawn link.
{movement_rule_text} How many adjacent empty points are reachable by one drawn link from the X-marked piece?
capture_move_count: {capture_rule_text} How many legal capture landing points does the X-marked piece have?
{capture_rule_text} Count the empty landing points for legal capture jumps by the X-marked piece.
{capture_rule_text} What is the number of straight jump-over capture moves for the X-marked piece?
{capture_rule_text} Count only empty landing points reached by jumping over one occupied adjacent point.
{capture_rule_text} How many empty landing points can the X-marked piece reach by one capture jump?

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_sparse_links: a point-and-link movement board with many missing links and several pieces
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_mixed_links: a point-and-link movement board with some missing links and several pieces
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_dense_links: a point-and-link movement board with dense drawn links and several pieces
code_prompt_defaults.movement_rule_text: A one-step move must follow one drawn link from the X-marked piece to an adjacent empty point; occupied adjacent points and missing links do not count.
code_prompt_defaults.capture_rule_text: A capture move must jump in a straight line over one occupied adjacent point and land on the empty point immediately beyond it; both links in that straight line must be drawn.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_marked_piece_destination: set "annotation" to [x, y] pixel points at the centers of every empty point the X-marked piece can legally move to; use an empty array if there are none
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_marked_piece_destination_cou: set "answer" to the number of legal destinations for the X-marked piece
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_capture_move_count: set "annotation" to [x, y] pixel points at the centers of every empty point where the X-marked piece can move to capture; use an empty array if there are none
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_capture_move_count: set "answer" to the number of legal capture moves for the X-marked piece
